metadata.description: Opinionated, checklist-driven skills for professional software development across languages - Python libraries and web apps, Go projects, Swift/Apple apps, Rust crates, and Scala projects

plugins.name: python-library-complete
plugins.description: Complete Python library development toolkit - all Python skills for building professional-grade libraries, web apps, and MCP servers

plugins.name: python-mcp-servers
plugins.description: Build robust Python MCP servers - tool error contracts, subprocess wrapping, single-file vs packaged distribution, and global-state-free testing

plugins.name: python-web-app
plugins.description: Opinionated reference architecture for building production Python web apps - FastAPI, async SQLAlchemy, Stripe, and Dockerized deployment

plugins.name: python-library-foundations
plugins.description: Core skills for starting Python library projects - setup, quality, and testing

plugins.name: python-library-distribution
plugins.description: Skills for packaging, releasing, and distributing Python libraries

plugins.name: python-library-quality
plugins.description: Quality-focused skills - security, performance, API design, and git hygiene

plugins.name: swift-apps
plugins.description: Build, test, and ship native Swift/SwiftUI apps for Apple platforms - unsigned CI builds, the hand-maintained pbxproj, SwiftPM-vs-app-target test boundaries, Keychain/OAuth security, CloudKit/SwiftData constraints, plus git hygiene

plugins.name: go-projects
plugins.description: Set up and maintain Go projects with a CI gate that actually gates - module-path correctness, golangci-lint config matched to the installed major, deterministic gofmt, a pinned toolchain, meaningful test jobs, plus git hygiene

plugins.name: rust-crates
plugins.description: Set up, test, and publish Rust crates - Cargo layout, a fmt/clippy(-D warnings)/test CI gate, MSRV pinning, feature-flag hygiene, crates.io publishing, plus git hygiene

plugins.name: scala-projects
plugins.description: Set up, test, and publish Scala projects - sbt layout, scalafmt/scalafix gates, Scala 2-vs-3 cross-building, real test jobs, Maven Central publishing via sbt-ci-release, plus git hygiene
